prompt: I want to build a 2D top-down action RPG in Godot, like a simplified Zelda. The player fights slime enemies with a sword. I have pixel art assets from CraftPix (64x64 sprites). Help me plan and get started — what should we do first?

assertions.text: Uses three-tier scope (MUST HAVE / SHOULD HAVE / OUT OF SCOPE)
Creates GDD.md separate from CLAUDE.md (two distinct documents)
Mentions design pillars or core loop concept
Mentions delegating to subagents for heavy work
Specifies incremental build order with testing after each entity
Includes anti-patterns from real sessions (body collision, area_entered, etc.)
Asks user to name the game
Shows collision layers with explicit bitmask values (not just layer numbers)
Mentions analyzing sprite sheets before writing animation code
